models.name: organization_sumtotal
models.description: This table is the master list for all organizational units, like domains or departments. It serves as the central source of truth for the company's hierarchy, referenced by other tables (e.g., persondomain,personorganization) to link users to their correct place in the structure. Use this table when you need to: 1. Map organizational structure and reporting hierarchies, 2. Control access and permissions based on organizational units, 3. Generate department-specific learning reports and analytics, 4. Manage organizational changes and restructuring, 5. Track learning initiatives by department or division, 6. Implement role-based access controls and content filtering.

properties.description: Unique identifier for organizations within the organization_sumtotal table.

This table is the master list for all organizational units, like domains or departments. It serves as the central source of truth for the company's hierarchy, referenced by other tables (e.g., persondomain,personorganization) to link users to their correct place in the structure.
